name: brainer
description: Token/context-efficient skills for AI coding agents. 18 skills across output style, planning, lean execution, verification, wiki memory (write-gate / wiki-refresh / provenance trust), prompt triage, PreCompact extraction, semantic AST diff, output filtering, retrieval indexing, task-end retrospectives, loop/verifier-gate design, LLM-as-judge output gating, and drift mitigation (one always-on watcher: periodic re-anchor + symptomatic probes). Measured per-skill savings range from ~-20% (routing) to ~-97% (re-reads / compaction) depending on skill type; see eval/FINDINGS.md.
author: Saar Shai

plugins.name: brainer
plugins.description: All 18 skills bundled; compliance-canary (the single drift watcher — periodic re-anchor + symptomatic probes, formerly two skills) auto-wires its UserPromptSubmit hook (auto-install: true, default-on since v1.7); loop-engineering and eval-gate ship opt-in (auto-install: false, wire no hook).

hooks.description: prompt-triage classifier; opt-in via plugin config.
